---
title: "Space-Time Modeling: Covariance, Dynamics, and Dimension Reduction"
subtitle: "Track B — Geospatial"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Space-Time Modeling: Covariance, Dynamics, and Dimension Reduction

**Track**: Track B — Geospatial

Modeling phenomena that vary across both space and time: spatio-temporal covariance structures, dynamic models, and the computational methods required for large spatio-temporal datasets.

## Table of Contents

1. Spatio-Temporal Covariance Functions
2. Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Models
3. Hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Models
4. Dimension Reduction for Large Datasets
5. Spatio-Temporal Point Processes (Expanded)
6. Multivariate Spatio-Temporal Models
7. Spatio-Temporal Extremes
8. Machine Learning for Spatio-Temporal Data

---

## Chapter 1: Spatio-Temporal Covariance Functions

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Dynamic Spatio-Temporal Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Hierarchical Spatio-Temporal Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Dimension Reduction for Large Datasets

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Spatio-Temporal Point Processes (Expanded)

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Multivariate Spatio-Temporal Models

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Spatio-Temporal Extremes

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Machine Learning for Spatio-Temporal Data

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
